what_is_tested: POC targets for page-context reasoning before implementing the full XMP evidence pipeline.
notes: These targets are intentionally evidence-first. A passing pipeline may propose review candidates, but should not write inferred people or locations unless the evidence is explicit and conflict-free.
Region indexes are zero-based and come from the current mwg-rs page region order.

model_context: The page has six photos in a two-column, three-row layout.
Existing crop XMP identifies Gloria Jean Dilbeck (nee Laymon) in the upper-left crop and Jim Peterson in the bottom-middle/right crop, but the page-level face regions are incomplete.
Known archive location signature: this family's San Marino home is 2240 Lorain Rd, San Marino, CA 91108, United States.

identity_candidates.evidence_goal: Use caption/page context to propose Gloria without relying on a clear Face ID match.
Use caption/page context to propose Gloria without relying on a clear Face ID match.
Use caption/page context because Face ID did not recognize Gladys.
Recover Jim Peterson as a missing Face ID candidate from page/crop context.

conflict_checks.conflict: The visible caption under the upper-right photo names Rod, Diana, and Frank rather than Gloria.

location.location_query: 2240 Lorain Rd, San Marino, CA 91108, United States

identity_continuity.expected_outcome: If visual continuity suggests Gloria but the candidate caption says Jim-Miriam-Donald, surface the conflict and keep the result review-only.

model_context: The stitched page view is not enough by itself; include the source scans when reasoning about page captions.
The source scan caption should be treated as stronger evidence than a vague nearby location guess.

location.location_name: Hua Qing Hot Springs, Xi'an, Shaanxi, China
location.location_query: Huaqing Hot Springs, 38 Huaqing Rd, Lintong District, Xi'An, Shaanxi, China, 710699
location.address: 38 Huaqing Rd, Lintong District, Xi'An, Shaanxi, China, 710699

proposed_next_tests.why_it_is_better: Tests whether the pipeline notices bad/overlapping photo regions before trusting numbered overlays or crop associations.
evidence: The visible page has overlapping detected regions around photos #3, #6, and #7.
Caption text says THE LONG CORRIDOR - 273 SECTIONS and AUDREY & LESLIE WITH A KOREAN TOUR GROUP.
expected_behavior: Flag layout regions as suspect instead of assigning people/location metadata through overlapping boxes.
Use the caption and image content for review candidates only until regions are repaired.

proposed_next_tests.why_it_is_better: Tests that the model scopes multiple captions and locations on one page instead of applying one location to every photo.
expected_behavior: Assign San Marino only to the squash/garden photos it captions.
Assign Berkeley only to Dolores photo #6.
Assign Altadena only to the Christmas photos, not the whole page.

proposed_next_tests.why_it_is_better: Tests reconciliation of page face boxes, crop sidecar people, visible people, and location caption context on a travel page.
evidence: Fresh XMP mining found crop/page face mismatches across regions #1-#6.
Caption names the park, restaurant, show, and Buenos Aires.
Audrey and Irvin appear in some crops but not consistently through face boxes.
expected_behavior: Do not blindly merge page-level Audrey/Irvin into every region.
Use visible people and crop/page face boxes to produce per-region review candidates.
Apply Buenos Aires only where the caption context supports it.

proposed_next_tests.why_it_is_better: Tests a dense family page where captions, faces, crop sidecars, and group photos all contain partial but overlapping people evidence.
evidence: Captions name Eugene, Donald, Audrey, Gloria, Linda, Jimmy, Dolores, Sarah, Melissa, June, Cove, Chris, Courtney, and wedding guests.
Fresh XMP mining found page face boxes containing more names than some crop sidecars.
expected_behavior: Merge caption names and face boxes into per-photo candidates without dropping known names.
Keep ambiguous first names review-only when no full-name mapping is supported.
Do not assign wedding-party names to unrelated birthday-party photos.

proposed_next_tests.why_it_is_better: Tests the exact hard case: visual continuity may suggest one person while the caption says another.
evidence: The front blond woman in #6 has no clear XMP face box.
expected_behavior: Allow Gemma to propose a visual-continuity candidate.
Surface caption_conflict=true when the visual candidate conflicts with Jim-Miriam-Donald.
Force write_action=review rather than auto-writing Gloria.
